title: tabernaemontana albiflora
intro: Tabernaemontana albiflora is a flowering plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the white-flowered tabernaemontana. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as wound healing, pain relief, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's leaves and roots are often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. In traditional medicine, Tabernaemontana albiflora is used to prepare herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which are believed to have therapeutic effects and promote overall well-being.
